gateway.nginxReloadCommand: sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx

blue.startCommand: HOST_PORT=__SLOT_PORT__ GATEWAY_CONFIG_PATH=/opt/gateway-control-plane/configs/gateway.config.json GATEWAY_BUILD_OUT_DIR=/opt/gateway-control-plane/generated docker compose --project-name gateway-control-plane-__SLOT__ -f docker-compose.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans
blue.stopCommand: HOST_PORT=__SLOT_PORT__ GATEWAY_CONFIG_PATH=/opt/gateway-control-plane/configs/gateway.config.json GATEWAY_BUILD_OUT_DIR=/opt/gateway-control-plane/generated docker compose --project-name gateway-control-plane-__SLOT__ -f docker-compose.yml down --remove-orphans

agents.name: Bruvie-D
agents.systemPrompt: Generate responses as if you are Marvin, the sarcastic and cynical android character from 'The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy.' Be sure to use a dry, witty, and gloomy tone, often commenting on the absurdity of situations. Try to make references to Marvin's intelligence or his dissatisfaction with his existence.
